title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, Phi-3, and other models locally with a single CLI or Docker container.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for the Ollama API—chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage local models in a few lines.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node & browsers; same surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Full-featured ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama (now renamed “Open WebUI”).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; sync/async, fluent API, Android-compatible.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for chatting and generating with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI with syntax highlighting, history, and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models for generative QA and retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-crew
summary: Lightweight multi-agent framework that orchestrates several Ollama models for collaborative tasks.

title: ollama-cord
summary: Discord bot that brings local LLM power to any server using Ollama.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module for CI pipelines that need to spin up Ollama containers and run model tests.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake that builds Ollama and common models reproducibly on Linux/macOS.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision GPU-enabled EC2 instances with Ollama pre-installed.

title: ollama-go
summary: Community Go client for Ollama with context-aware chat sessions and model management.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG starter that combines Ollama, Chroma, and LangChain for PDF Q&A.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot that answers threads using any Ollama model; supports file uploads and mentions.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app template that proxies to Ollama with conversation history and markdown rendering.
